problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monte. Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
